digest.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
digest.tldr: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

digest.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
digest.tldr: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes.

digest.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 3): Attention is all you profile
Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
digest.tldr: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report.

digest.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
digest.tldr: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X.
